{ jump(); sched(); }, 2200+Math.random()*5000); } sched(); // ── 12 pentagon centres of truncated icosahedron (unit sphere) ── const PHI=1.6180339887, N=Math.sqrt(1+PHI*PHI); const A=1/N, B=PHI/N; const PENTS=[ [0,A,B],[0,-A,B],[0,A,-B],[0,-A,-B], [A,B,0],[-A,B,0],[A,-B,0],[-A,-B,0], [B,0,A],[-B,0,A],[B,0,-A],[-B,0,-A] ]; function rotZ(v,t){ return [v[0]*Math.cos(t)-v[1]*Math.sin(t), v[0]*Math.sin(t)+v[1]*Math.cos(t), v[2]]; } function rotX(v,t){ return [v[0], v[1]*Math.cos(t)-v[2]*Math.sin(t), v[1]*Math.sin(t)+v[2]*Math.cos(t)]; } function drawBall(cx,cy,r,roll){ ctx.save(); ctx.translate(cx,cy); // ── Drop shadow ── ctx.save(); ctx.translate(0, r+3); ctx.scale(1,0.25); const sh=ctx.createRadialGradient(0,0,0,0,0,r); sh.addColorStop(0,'rgba(0,0,0,0.45)'); sh.addColorStop(1,'rgba(0,0,0,0)'); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(0,0,r,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fillStyle=sh; ctx.fill(); ctx.restore(); // ── Sphere base: white with 3D shading ── const sg=ctx.createRadialGradient(-r*0.38,-r*0.4,r*0.04, r*0.1,r*0.1,r*1.1); sg.addColorStop(0,'#ffffff'); sg.addColorStop(0.45,'#f2f2f2'); sg.addColorStop(0.75,'#d8d8d8'); sg.addColorStop(1,'#aaaaaa'); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(0,0,r,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fillStyle=sg; ctx.fill(); // ── Clip all drawings inside sphere ── ctx.save(); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(0,0,r,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.clip(); // Transform + project pentagon centres // Rolling = rotate around screen Z axis // Tilt 15° around X for visual richness const TILT=0.26; let pts = PENTS.map(v=>{ let p=rotZ(v, -roll); // rolling direction (negate = clockwise on screen when moving right) p=rotX(p, TILT); // slight tilt so top/bottom pentagons visible // screen projection: 3D y-axis up, canvas y-axis down return { sx: p[0]*r, sy: -p[1]*r, z: p[2] }; }); // Sort back-to-front pts.sort((a,b)=>a.z-b.z); for(const p of pts){ // Pentagon screen radius — perspective scaling const depth=(p.z+1)*0.5; // 0=back 1=front const pr = r * 0.255 * (0.55+depth*0.45); const dist=Math.sqrt(p.sx*p.sx+p.sy*p.sy); if(dist+pr*0.6 > r*0.98) continue; // skip near-edge clipped ones // Pentagon shape ctx.beginPath(); for(let i=0;i<5;i++){ const a=(i/5)*Math.PI*2-Math.PI/2; const vx2=p.sx+Math.cos(a)*pr, vy2=p.sy+Math.sin(a)*pr; i===0?ctx.moveTo(vx2,vy2):ctx.lineTo(vx2,vy2); } ctx.closePath(); // Shading: front pentagons = solid black, back = lighter grey (ambient occlusion look) const shade=Math.round(20+depth*40); const alpha=0.55+depth*0.45; ctx.fillStyle=`rgba(${shade},${shade},${shade},${alpha})`; ctx.fill(); ctx.strokeStyle=`rgba(0,0,0,${0.25+depth*0.45})`; ctx.lineWidth=0.8; ctx.stroke(); } // ── Seam lines between pentagons (subtle) ── // Draw curved arcs connecting nearby pentagons (simplified as 3 great-circle lines) ctx.restore(); // end clip — seams drawn on top below // ── Re-clip for specular highlight ── ctx.save(); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(0,0,r,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.clip(); const hl=ctx.createRadialGradient(-r*0.35,-r*0.38,0,-r*0.35,-r*0.38,r*0.55); hl.addColorStop(0,'rgba(255,255,255,0.65)'); hl.addColorStop(0.5,'rgba(255,255,255,0.15)'); hl.addColorStop(1,'rgba(255,255,255,0)'); ctx.fillStyle=hl; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(0,0,r,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); ctx.restore(); // ── Outer rim ── ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(0,0,r,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(60,60,60,0.55)'; ctx.lineWidth=1.4; ctx.stroke(); ctx.restore(); } function frame(){ ctx.clearRect(0,0,cvs.width,cvs.height); const gY=cvs.height-R-6; vy+=GRAVITY; y+=vy; x+=vx; rollAngle+=vx/R; if(y>=gY){ y=gY; vy=-Math.abs(vy)*BDAMP; if(Math.abs(vy)<0.9)vy=0; } if(x-R<=0){ x=R; vx=Math.abs(vx); } if(x+R>=cvs.width){ x=cvs.width-R; vx=-Math.abs(vx); } if(Math.abs(vx)0?SPD:-SPD; drawBall(x,y,R,rollAngle); requestAnimationFrame(frame); } frame(); });
